CustomField.description: There is no intention for proposed event to result in a consensus statement, paper, or publication? (Mark “No” if event may result in a consensus statement, paper, or publication)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: 6. There is no intention for proposed event to result in a consensus statement, paper, or publication? (Mark “No” if event may result in a consensus statement, paper, or publication)
CustomField.label: Is no intention for event
